vl53l0x_config_i2c.tooltip: Configure the I2C pins used by the VL53L0X sensor

vl53l0x_init_with_wire.tooltip: Initialize the VL53L0X laser ranging sensor and specify the I2C bus used

vl53l0x_begin.tooltip: Initialize VL53L0X laser ranging sensor, configure I2C pins and check connections

vl53l0x_ranging_test.message0: Sensor %1 takes measurements and stores the results %2
vl53l0x_ranging_test.tooltip: Make a detailed measurement and store the results in a specified variable

vl53l0x_check_range_valid.tooltip: Check whether the measurement result is valid. If the status value is not 4, it means it is valid.

vl53l0x_get_range_mm.message0: Get the distance (mm) from the measurement result %1
vl53l0x_get_range_mm.tooltip: Get distance data from measurement results in millimeters
